reviews.comment:
Soy socio desde hace más de 3 décadas y tengo auto desde hace casi 40. Nunca me atendieron tan mal. Los playeros peleándose a los gritos delante de los clientes para ver quién atendía y quién se tomaba el descanso. 😡 El ACA se merece un mejor nivel.👎🏻

(Translated by Google)
I have been a member for more than 3 decades and I have had a car for almost 40. They have never treated me so poorly. The beachgoers shouting fights in front of the customers to see who was serving and who was taking a break. 😡 The ACA deserves a better level.👎🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbUt5SUt3EAE

reviews.comment:
En temporada dos cajeras!!! A ponerse las pilas, organizando eso. Baños excelentes como siempre. Comida se quedan corto con el stock.una sola fila para una gaseosa que para un menú.

(Translated by Google)
Two cashiers during peak season!!! They need to get their act together and organize that. The restrooms are excellent as always. The food selection is limited; there's only one line for a soda, not for a meal.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, buena atención y gra variedad de productos para un desayuno o merienda. No aceptan tarjeta de previaje, una lastima .

Good service, friendly staff, and a wide variety of products for breakfast or a snack. Unfortunately, they don't accept pre-trip cards.
